channel.title: Go Humble! RSS SOFTWARE
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle software bundles!

item.title: Learn To Make Games in Godot By GameDev.tv
item.content:encoded: Become a game dev mastermind when you harness the power of Godot! Learn how to create your own action RPG from the ground up with compelling combat mechanics, develop your own gravity-defying 3D platformer, build a 2D action-adventure game, and so much more with this curated bundle of approachable learning courses. Harness the power of Godot to bring your dream game to life, all for a price you choose. Unlock the very best from GameDev.TV and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase.

item.title: The Ultimate Tech Interview Prep Bundle by Packt
item.description: Ace your next interview with ease!
item.content:encoded: Looking for a new tech job but afraid you’ll fumble the interview? Don’t worry—we’ve got just the bundle for you, full to the brim with interview mastery guides and prep questions from Packt! Prepare to ace your next tech interview with a trove of programming tests for C++, TypeScript, JavaScript, and more! Get advice on how to land your next position in an AI-powered landscape! Learn how to confidently handle anything an interviewer will throw your way, and how to revamp your resume, cover letters, and portfolio to be a competitive candidate! The job search can be tough, but this software bundle has everything you need to take the next step in your career and land the position you’ve always dreamed of! Every purchase of this bundle at the price of your choice supports Worldreader.

item.title: The Complete Agentic AI, Python, LLM & Robotics Mega Bundle+
item.content:encoded: Turn your curiosity about robotics into real-life skills with The Complete Agentic AI, Python, LLM & Robotics Mega Bundle! This open-source, engine-focused collection harnesses the approachable and practical power of Python to deliver clear results with big-time applications. Unlock first-time Humble Bundle exclusive courses like Introduction to Webots Robotic Simulator, Foundations of Robotics Simulation in Python, and Search and Rescue Drone Swarm Robots in Godot alongside 50+ additional can’t-miss courses. Keep your skills fresh and competitive, and help support One Tree Planted with your purchase.

item.title: Decibel Domination
item.description: The sonic power of Decibel Domination
item.content:encoded:
Set up an epic action scene with the perfect soundtrack for an action flick, chill out with an ambient music pack, or scare the hell out of your listeners with eerie horror tracks. Bring realism and character to the mundane corners of life with the Environmental Ambiences Sound FX Pack, or add a magical twist to your world with the Ambient Fantasy Music Pack! This curated library offers more than 1,000 unique tunes and tones for you to experiment with and costs a fraction of the retail price. Get the Decibel Domination Bundle today and help support the Children's Miracle Network.

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before April 9th, 2027.

item.title: Supreme 3 Best of Unity and Unreal Assets
item.content:encoded:
Dive into the latest asset collection that offers the widest range of stylized towns, buildings, and more with The Supreme 3 Best of Unity and Unreal Assets Bundle! Save time and money by accessing this pro-quality library of 75+ asset sets. Unlock exclusive terrain-scattering tools for awesome volcanic land environments, add color with retro Pop Art living spaces, give your starfighter’s technicians a realistic sci-fi engineering bay, and so much more. Get the environmental assets you need to help bring your game to life and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before March 12th, 2027.

item.title: Zero to Game Dev Hero - Course/Learning Bundle
item.description: Build the games you’ve always wanted to play
item.content:encoded:
Here’s the situation: You’ve got ideas for designing the perfect video game, but you just don’t have the skills yet to make it happen. Luckily, we have just the bundle for you, chock-full of the game development software you’ve always wanted for a fraction of the price. Design whole worlds in all kinds of game genres in Unity, Godot, and Blender; take game developer practice exams for multiple engines; and learn how to 3D model environments, characters, and items completely from scratch! Everything you need to create the universes and stories you’ve always dreamed of is right here for the price of your choice, and every purchase of this bundle supports Code.org’s mission to bring computer science to students everywhere.

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before April 7th, 2027.

item.title: Beat Builders 3: Sounds for Producers and Game Developers
item.description: Build beats from the ground up
item.content:encoded: Looking for sold-out stadium sized savings on the hottest beats, sounds and beyond? Then you need the Beat Builders 3 by Function Loops. Get help recording original tracks with the dopest royalty-free beats in a variety of genres using the hottest sound packs like UFO Drumkit - Trap & Hip Hop, Popular - Vocal Pop, and more! With hundreds of beats at your fingertips, the perfect tune is only a click away. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support the next generations of musicians at Music Will.

item.title: Sci-Fi Game Dev Assets by Synty
item.content:encoded: Ready the engines—it’s time to blast off with a massive collection of sci-fi game dev assets by Synty! Power up your project with the sharpest polygon assets, usher in particle FX packs, and construct breathtaking sci-fi cityscapes rich with buildings, vehicles, infrastructure, and everything else you need to bring life to your fictional worlds beyond the stars. Design intricate HUDs for your out-of-this-world Sidekick soldiers. Pay what you want for a star-studded collection of assets and help support Child’s Play with your purchase!

item.title: Sample Logic Creative Tools Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Pay what you want for two of the most powerful creative tools on the market with our latest bundle with Sample Logic! Start off with Animation Station 2.0, the virtual instrument MIDI engine for most major DAW platforms armed with 2.0-exclusive benefits like 750+ combined presets and a realtime 4-pattern switching system. And with Realms you gain access to 400+ effect presets, 4 dynamic effect modules, easily accessible presets, and countless other pro-quality tools. Unlock Sample Logic’s best tools and help support Music Will with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before March 30th, 2027

item.title: Ultimate Survival Kit Redux
item.content:encoded: We’ve assembled a war-ready collection of assets to unleash on your competition! Bring the boom to your game’s battles with high-definition T90 & M1A2 battle tanks, zombie soldiers, and more. Or build the dystopian future of your dreams with a cyberpunk city, futuristic airship, noir city apartment, and beyond! No two are the same, and any situation is covered when you shop with Humble Bundle. Pay what you want to jump-start your development cycle with time-saving assets and help support Save the Children with your purchase.

item.title: The 2026 AWS, CompTIA, Azure, Google Cloud, Cybersecurity, and AI Certification Bundle
item.description: Certs’ up—don’t miss the digital wave
item.content:encoded: It’s time for a new job—develop the fundamental skills needed to prepare for career-changing exams with our latest Software Bundle. This comprehensive curriculum offers first-time exclusive Humble Bundle releases like AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer – Associate with 10 Practice Exams, Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Fundamentals with 10 Practice Exams, and more. Ace your Amazon Web Services, CompTIA, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud certification exams with confidence, and help support Girls Who Code when you purchase prep resources from Humble Bundle.

item.title: Extreme Game Dev Bundle
item.content:encoded: Stop letting the dev process eat up valuable man-hours and start using these amazing assets from Leartes Studios. Create realistic Soviet streets, Old Town Dubrovnik, Stylized Steampunk cities, gorgeous gardens, and more with the Extreme Game Dev Bundle. Act now and unlock the 1950s Characters Bundle alongside 30+ unique asset packs! Pay what you want for AAA-quality creation tools and help support code.org when you shop at Humble Bundle.

item.title: Maximum Chill Music Bundle - Royalty-free ambient, lo-fi, piano, and meditation music!
item.description: Lo-fi beats to relax and study to
item.content:encoded:
Give your creative projects a chilled-out, laid-back mood with this bundle of relaxing and royalty-free music files! (Yes, we’re using exclamation points because we’re excited about this bundle! But we’re also very chill and relaxed.) Set the mood for a movie scene, a video game quest, or simply meditate your cares away with the calming sounds of deep space, warm guitars, tastefully elegant piano solos, and ambient noises to dream by. Get all of these soundscapes and more to complete your audiovisual projects—or for whatever makes you feel most restful—choose what you wish to pay, and support diabetes charity Breakthrough T1D with your purchase!

License Agreement prior to purchasing.

item.title: Movavi Video & Photo Set - Create Awesome Content Easily
item.content:encoded: Let’s add professional-quality polish to your soon-to-be viral streams and vlogs. Make video editing easier when you get the Movavi Video & Photo Set Bundle. Unlock a curated collection of Movavi Video Editor 2025 courses, including the Good Game Pack and the Dynamic Transitions Pack. Add overlays, dynamic transitions, and timers, toy around with fancy intros and outros, and so much more. Learn top Movavi techniques taught directly by Movavi experts and help support the ACLU with your purchase.

item.title: Python: Build and Ship 2026
item.description: Build apps and beyond with Python
item.content:encoded: We’ve partnered with Zenva Academy to deliver the ultimate Python Bundle. Unlock amazing courses now: become a business mogul with SaaS App with Python - Stripe Integration, clean up with Web Scraping and Data Cleaning with Python, code with confidence with The Complete Python Functional Programming Course, and more. Build and ship software, apps, bots, and more with this ultra-powerful and user-friendly programming language and help support the next generation of creatives at code.org with your purchase!

item.title: MAGIX Ultimate Creative Bundle
item.description: Take your creativity to the next level
item.content:encoded: Are you ready to bring your creative projects to life? This bundle of audiovisual software tools from MAGIX is the first step! Whether you’re an aspiring director, a photographer with a vision, or a musician just waiting to compose the next hit, we’ve got the software you need to make it a reality. For the videographers out there, edit and enhance your footage like a professional with Video Pro X16. Organize your cherished memories or make a digital storyboard with Photostory Deluxe 2024. Lay down some beats and polish your sick jams with Music Maker 2024 Premium. Get all this and more—plus a few handy content coupons—for the low price of your choosing, and support One Tree Planted with your purchase!
